package_name: Capacity, Eviction, Time Range, And Extreme Profiles
core_rules: Capacity is profile-defined, not hot-path discovered.
All active containers must share uniform capacity and slot layout.
Extreme default profile is preferred for pre-bridge operation.
Eviction is exceptional and safe-point guarded.
Time range is ordering metadata only.
Capacity pressure must not turn pre-bridge CME into a broker or retry engine.
